title: galium angustifolium subsp. foliosum
intro: Galium angustifolium subsp. foliosum, also known as narrow-leaved bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium angustifolium plant, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Galium angustifolium subsp. foliosum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
